hero.name: Sergio!
hero.bio: Systems Engineering student and Full Stack Developer with experience in React and Express. Passionate about creating scalable and efficient solutions, specialized in REST APIs, agile methodologies like Gitflow, and with solid knowledge in design patterns.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.description: Design and implementation of responsive web interfaces focused on accessibility and user experience, integration of new features following best practices and design patterns, and optimization of product performance and SEO.

devcamp.title: Full Stack Web Development
devcamp.description: Comprehensive training in modern web development: use of Node.js and Express for the backend, React and Tailwind CSS for creating dynamic and responsive interfaces, implementation of design patterns, and management of relational and non-relational databases.

oracle.title: ONE Front-end Program
oracle.description: International certification in frontend development with Oracle and Alura. Training in React using hooks, React Router for navigation, integration of external libraries, responsive design, API consumption, and application of programming best practices.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that demonstrate my expertise in modern web development and innovative design.

items.title: DevCampus - Course Platform
items.description: Modern online course platform with search, dynamic filters, and a complete admin panel built with Strapi.
items.fullDescription: A modern online course platform built with React and Strapi CMS. Allows users to explore, view course syllabi, search courses by title, and dynamically filter by difficulty level. Includes responsive design, dark mode, and an admin panel for content management.

items.title: NutriVision AI - Nutritional Analysis
items.description: Platform that uses AI to detect ingredients in food images and calculate nutritional information in real time.
items.fullDescription: A web application that integrates Artificial Intelligence to analyze food images. The system uses Google Gemini to detect ingredients, OpenCV to process images and generate bounding boxes, and presents results with a complete nutritional analysis and interactive 3D visualization.

items.title: UNAL Events - Event Management System
items.description: Management and visualization of events at the National University of Colombia (React + Strapi).
items.fullDescription: Web system for managing and visualizing events at the National University of Colombia. Frontend in React + TypeScript + Vite and backend with Strapi v5 as Headless CMS. Includes dynamic search, category filters, detailed views, responsive design, and light/dark mode. Dockerized and deployed on Vercel (frontend) and Strapi Cloud (backend).

items.title: UNAL Lost Objects
items.description: Platform to manage lost and found objects at the National University, built with MVC architecture and Atomic Design.
items.fullDescription: A complete web platform designed to efficiently manage the loss and recovery of objects on UNAL campuses. Uses MVC architecture on the backend with Express and TypeScript, and an Atomic design system on the frontend with React for maximum scalability and maintainability.

items.title: EcoScan 3D - AI Recycling Analysis
items.description: Platform that uses AI to identify and classify waste from images, offering recycling recommendations and interactive 3D visualizations.
items.fullDescription: EcoScan 3D is an innovative web platform that educates about recycling. It allows users to analyze waste by uploading an image or using their camera in real time. The application combines object detection with YOLOv5, personalized tips generation with ChatGPT, and interactive 3D visualization with Three.js, creating an educational and engaging experience.

contact.title: Contact
contact.connectWith: Connect with me on professional networks
reasons: Adaptability to different environments and technologies

footer.description: Full Stack developer passionate about creating innovative web solutions that combine exceptional functionality with elegant design.
